$note: De-identified aggregate summary of the OSC participation survey. Do not commit the raw CSV (names, sex, race/ethnicity). Regenerate with summarize_survey.py.

meta.instrument: Pre/post self-assessment on a 1-5 comfort scale

headline_stats.label: earned co-authorship on a CNS 2026 abstract
reported increased interest in research-oriented careers
would recommend OSC to another medical student

baseline: Most participants began from a near-zero baseline: 7 of 16 had no prior coding experience, and 15 of 16 had no prior hands-on medical-imaging analysis experience.

quotes.text: Learning how to apply coding and imaging analysis to real clinical research projects.
Troubleshooting and thinking critically is a valuable skill that isn't used often during the preclinical years — and I have thoroughly enjoyed that process.
It's amazing that we can run programs like this with little to no prior coding experience.
